controlledSharing.cloud: Only you and your PI can see your data by default.
controlledSharing.label: Controlled sharing.
controlledSharing.nonCloud: As PI, you can see the data of all members of your group. Other group members can only see their own data by default.
controlledSharing.shareInstructions: You can let others in your lab see or edit a specific document or notebook by selecting it in the workspace and clicking SHARE. YOU decide when to share your work, who to share it with and what level of access other users have; either 'read only' or 'edit'.

labGroup.intro: You can organise your colleagues into LabGroups to make collaboration and oversight easier.
labGroup.openSharing: Open sharing. It may be that your group is 'open' and you want all data to be shared automatically amongst its members. Your group members can opt-in to this after they join the group, by enabling autosharing.
labGroup.sharingOptionsIntro: There are two options for sharing data in LabGroups:
labGroup.visibilityNote: Your work is ONLY ever visible to members of groups that you belong to.

projectGroup.dataPrivate: All data is private, unless explicitly shared among group members.
projectGroup.heading: Create a Project Group
projectGroup.intro: You can organise your colleagues into Project Groups to allow data sharing.
projectGroup.leave: Any group member may leave, except the last Group Owner.
projectGroup.noPi: There is no PI in a Project Group. There must be at least one Group Owner, by default the creator of the group.
projectGroup.ownerDelete: The Group Owner can delete the group.
projectGroup.ownerInvite: The Group Owner can invite new members.
projectGroup.ownerPromote: The Group Owner can make other users Group Owners.

filter.globalIdPrompt: Enter a global ID of a document, notebook, or Inventory item, e.g. SD12345
filter.usersPrompt: Enter a user or users to audit

changeFormIcon.instruction: Select a file and view resized to icon proportions before submitting

uploadImage.instruction: Please upload a gif, jpeg, or png format profile image

verificationPassword.description: This password provides an additional layer of security when performing sensitive actions such as changing email address or signing documents. It should not be the same as your SingleSignOn or Google password.

cloud.searchPrompt: Please search for users using the search bar on the right of the page.

noResults.emptySearchResults: No {0} were found. Please try searching again.

errors.sysadminRequired: Only user with sysadmin role can delete filestore resources

errors.runAs: API key value cannot be accessed when 'operating as' another user

errors.alreadyRegistered: There is already user registered with this email
errors.confirmationMismatch: New email field does not match the confirm email
errors.tooLong: Email address is too long - should be less than {0} characters
errors.unchanged: Provided email is the same as your current email

hideProfile.label: Hide my profile from public listings

selfDeclarePi.canManage: You can manage your PI role.

errors.hasLabGroups: You must delete or transfer over all LabGroups before you can remove your PI status.
errors.notAllowed: User cannot self-declare as a PI (isAllowedPiRole=false).

selfDeclarePi.heading: Manage PI Role
selfDeclarePi.notPi: You are a regular user, without PI role.

errors.alreadySet: Verification password has already been set.
